comment: Honest counts. Zeros are real zeros — they are the argument, not an embarrassment. Source: Historic Tax Credit program data 2017–24 as compiled in the LFCD HTC plan, June 2026.

honestZeros.headline: Where we are today: $0.00
honestZeros.explainer: Of the $3.6 billion the Historic Tax Credit program has invested in New Orleans, the state recorded no projects in House District 100 — the district covering New Orleans East. The eastern lakefront has received virtually none of that investment. That is exactly what the Cultural District designation is built to change.
